portfolio.reason: Every project is a tailor-made solution - regardless of whether we are building a landing page, a large portal, or an extensive platform for a startup or organization.

ctaLionV1.title: Your business deserves an equally good website
desc: Ready for a site that not only looks great but primarily really supports sales and builds trust?
Tell us about your idea. We will prepare a free, no-obligation quote and a concrete action plan for you.

individualApproach.title: Websites Nowy Sącz - individual approach to the client
individualApproach.desc: The market is full of offers, from ready-made templates to large corporations. We fill the gap for those who value cooperation based on partnership. Creating unique websites is a craft for us, where delivering concrete business results counts.
individualApproach.q: What do you gain by choosing our dedicated solutions?

list.title: Direct contact
list.desc: You talk to an expert who is actually working on your project. No dead-end calls to a customer service office.

list.title: A unique website
list.desc: We reject repetitive templates and website builders. Each implementation is an original graphic design tailored to your industry and what your potential customers are looking for.

list.title: Industry experience
list.desc: We possess solid technical knowledge that allows us to execute even the most complex orders for websites, ensuring the highest quality of service.

individualApproach.reason: Client satisfaction is our priority, because we know that in the local market, customer trust and comprehensive service build the best recommendations.

shop.decor: With us, you gain more than just an online presence
shop.title: Online Stores Nowy Sącz - increase e-commerce profits
list: Integration with payment systems (BLIK, cards, quick transfers).
Modules supporting warehouse management and logistics.
Conversion support through a clear purchasing path.
shop.desc: For us, online stores are money-making machines. We ensure that store customers feel safe and are willing to finalize transactions. We also provide training in: technical operation of the online store.

ctaShop.title: Ready for a store that sells 24/7?
ctaShop.desc: Don't lose more customers due to an outdated ordering system or a complicated cart. We will build a modern e-commerce platform for you, fully integrated with payments and couriers. Get a free quote and find out how technology can automate your sales and maximize profits.
ctaShop.textButton: Ask for an online store quote

technicalSeo.title: Technical optimization instead of empty promises
desc: Many clients ask about SEO (positioning). As technical experts, we make it clear: we are not a marketing agency and do not offer subscription-based positioning (link building, copywriting). We prepare a solid foundation.

Thanks to this, your website is ready to decide on positioning or advertising campaigns at any time, with the certainty that the site does not require expensive fixes. Effective websites are those that technically do not block your growth.
list: Correct structure of headers and metadata

production.title: Comprehensive web development - How do we work?
production.desc: Our process is not just programming. We create websites based on a well-thought-out strategy. Every website created by us goes through a proven process, guaranteeing predictable and measurable results.

data.title: Analysis of your company's needs
data.desc: At the beginning, we get to know the specifics of your business and business goals. We analyze the market to understand who your potential customers are and create an effective website perfectly matched to your expectations.

data.title: Visual identity
data.desc: We design a modern, responsive, and attention-grabbing layout. We focus on an aesthetic design that will stand out online. Every visual identity is an original graphic design, created with clarity and user comfort in mind.

data.title: Programming
data.desc: We implement the site using the latest technologies, ensuring clean code. Our priority is speed of operation on every device, website security, and SEO correctness.

data.title: Deployment and updates
data.desc: We publish the finished site and provide technical support after its launch. Our websites are available to users without interruptions. We ensure that you receive a complete product, knowing that the website conveys information in a clear and fast way.

technology.title: Building websites based on WordPress
desc: We specialize in the WordPress system, but we don't cut corners. We implement it exclusively on custom themes, which guarantees clean code and a unique look (zero heavy ready-made templates). WordPress is a system that allows easy management via CMS without programming knowledge. Thanks to this, after the project is delivered, website administration is simple and pleasant for you, and you receive an intuitive interface where you can change texts or photos yourself.

With the most demanding projects in mind, we also offer super-efficient Headless solutions based on Next.js. We constantly follow the latest technological trends, which is why we are also slowly implementing the innovative content management system Keystatic into our projects.

rwd.title: RWD Standardization - responsive website for business
rwd.desc: Nowadays, most traffic comes from phones. That is why every one of our projects is a website adapted to mobile devices. Responsive websites (RWD) are a standard for us, not an extra paid option. We guarantee that the website appearance will be perfect on a smartphone, tablet, as well as on a large monitor.

price.title: Website pricing and price packages
desc: How much do professional websites cost? Every business is different, so we avoid rigid frames that try to force the client into a template. We offer an individual and free quote tailored perfectly to your needs and budget.
However, we don't want to leave you with the answer "it depends". To give you a real reference point, below we present the scope of a sample project.
list: Responsive website with an individual graphic design.
Set of basic tabs (e.g., Home, About Us, Offer, Blog, Contact).
Implementation of an intuitive management panel (CMS).
Full technical SEO optimization and high loading speed (Core Web Vitals).
Configuration of security, contact forms, and analytics (SSL certificate, Cookie Consent Mode v2, GDPR).
12 months of warranty for reliable site operation and 3 hours of technical support to use (e.g., for additional training or expansion).
price.price: Such an implementation - constituting a solid foundation for your business online - is an investment starting from 2999 PLN net.

items.introTxt: We do not apply hidden costs. Our price packages are transparent. What is always included in the price of every project?

elements.desc: We precede the project with an analysis of your industry and requirements so that the website meets business goals.

elements.title: Website security

elements.title: Preparation for SEO

elements.title: Traffic analytics

elements.title: Legal compliance (GDPR)
elements.desc: Preparation of a set of documents (Privacy Policy, clauses) and implementation of a cookie consent management system.

elements.title: Infrastructure

elements.title: Server deployment
elements.desc: Installation, email configuration, and final operation tests.

elements.title: Operation training
elements.desc: We teach you how to manage the website yourself.

elements.title: Full technical support
elements.desc: Update and technical support package (up to 3 hours per month to start).

elements.title: 12-month warranty
elements.desc: We provide free repairs of potential technical errors.

ctaPhone.title: Wondering which solution will be best for your company?
ctaPhone.desc: The above frames are just a starting point. Instead of fitting your business into ready-made packages, tell us about your goals. We will advise on which features will bring you the greatest benefit and prepare a transparent quote based on your real needs.

faq.title: FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions
faq.content: As website specialists, we respect your time. Here are the specifics that clients from Nowy Sącz ask about.

questions.q: How long does it take to build a website?
a: Fast turnaround time is our asset, but not at the expense of quality. A simple company business card site is usually created in 7-14 days. Extensive online stores or dedicated solutions may take from 3 to 6 weeks. Everything depends on the materials provided by the client.

questions.q: Will the website be visible in Google?
a: Yes, we ensure correctness in terms of SEO on a technical level. The page will be indexed and visible. However, high positions for competitive phrases (e.g., nationwide) are influenced by online marketing and long-term website positioning (SEO), which marketing agencies handle. We give you the ideal tool to start.

Every website implementation is covered by our support. If within a year of deployment something stops working due to a technical fault (code error, plugin conflict in the original version), we fix it for free. We also offer paid website maintenance after the warranty period.

questions.q: Do I need to have my own texts and photos?
a: It is not necessary at the start. We can prepare basic content for the site that will be linguistically correct and fill the site structure. However, if you care about high results in Google, we recommend ordering the service of professional texts from a copywriter. Such a person will create content strictly optimized for keywords, which will significantly facilitate later positioning. As for graphics – we offer access to stock photo banks, but remember that authentic photos of your company best build a credible image online.

questions.q: Do you help choose a server and domain?
a: Yes, and importantly - we protect your wallet. Virtual servers and domains often tempt with a price of "1 PLN" in the first year, only to surprise you after 12 months with an invoice for several hundred zlotys. We help select a stable solution with transparent renewal costs that does not generate hidden fees in the future. We also handle formalities such as domain registration.

ctaLionV2.title: We create websites for your business - Contact us
desc: Websites Nowy Sącz is our main slogan, but we serve clients from all over Poland. If you care about increasing your company's popularity through a professional image and are looking for a contractor who offers comprehensive customer service (but without unnecessary marketing fluff), call or write.
Adapting a website to your needs starts with a conversation.
